content.full_text:
CONFIRMATION OF TELEPHONE ADVICE

From: Lynda Cassady, Political Reform Consultant
Date: March 6, 1990
Caller: Chris, staff assistant
Assemblyman Paul Woodruff
Phone Number: 714-798-0337

Question:
Does a cable television station make a contribution when it requests Assemblyman Woodruff to participate in a cable television program in which Assemblyman Woodruff would interview government related persons such as a representative of the water quality control board?

Answer:
The Cable television station would be providing an in-kind contribution to Assemblyman Woodruff, subject to the contribution limits, when the program is shown during an election period. The election period begins when the Assemblyman files his statement to be listed on the ballot, and ends the day after the election. The definition of "election period" may be considered by the Commission in the near future.
